name: Framework Comparison Deck
description: A skill app template for researching and comparing open-source frameworks, configured here to produce a PowerPoint deck for OpenViking and Mem0.
prompts:
Create an English PowerPoint comparison report on the open-source agent memory frameworks OpenViking and Mem0, and save the final deck as `framework-comparison-report.pptx` in the current directory.

Workflow:
- First verify the correct repositories if the project names are ambiguous
- Gather evidence from GitHub, Reddit, and Twitter / X using the `reddit` and `agent-reach` skills
- Use official docs and other primary sources when they add useful evidence
- Compare architecture, memory model, developer experience, ecosystem traction, strengths, weaknesses, and best-fit use cases
- Then use the `pptx` skill to turn the findings into a concise slide deck

Deck requirements:
- Include an executive summary slide
- Include at least one comparison table
- Include a recommendation slide
- Add source links for important claims
- Keep the tone analytical and practical

skills.name: reddit
skills.description: Research Reddit discussions to extract relevant community feedback, recurring themes, and sentiment.

skills.name: agent-reach
skills.description: Gather and analyze Twitter / X posts, notable threads, and high-signal community reactions.

skills.name: pptx
skills.description: Create PowerPoint presentations and save the final output as a .pptx file.
